title: eragrostis wightiana
intro: Eragrostis wightiana is a type of grass native to India and Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis wightiana include infusions, decoctions, and powder, which can be used to treat various ailments.
